_meta.source_of_truth: skills/property-search/references/county-registry.md (mirror of the Google Sheet tab 'VA Counties Assessment & GIS Records')
_meta.drift_rule: registry.md coverage-table edits MUST update this file in the SAME commit (Build C brief, constraint 4)

Henrico.technique: Enter at the ROOT (deep links f?p=...:1 get 410'd by the URL firewall); search via the form (apex.submit {request:'SEARCH'}); open result detail (f?p=510101:5...).
Henrico.quirks: Do NOT use AGO 'Tax Parcels 0322' (735-row SAMPLE). APEX acreage often blank -> Zillow immediately.

Chesterfield.technique: Query the FeatureServer REST endpoint (JSON); layer 3 carries SaleDate/SalePrice.
Chesterfield.quirks: Strip dashes from TaxID. Gas OVERLAP: N. Chesterfield = Richmond Gas Works (instant_map), S. Chesterfield = Columbia Gas — the gas DB returns BOTH.

Hanover.technique: Find the live FeatureServer via performance.getEntriesByType('resource') filtered for rest/services; query parcel/improvements/sales layers.
Hanover.quirks: AGO mirror is STALE — use civ.quest.

Richmond City.quirks: Verify sales layer on next order.

Powhatan.technique: CivQuest portal; AGO Vision_Powhatan has SALEHIST — verify on next order.

New Kent.technique: Vision/vgsi: search by address -> Parcel.aspx?Pid=N. CivQuest as backup.

Chesapeake City.quirks: Confirm the MLS before pulling comps.

Charlotte.technique: Search by address or record#. Tax card shows building sections (A/B), foundation, ext walls, heat/AC, sketch.
Charlotte.quirks: Parcel# format: 086--A---7-A (keep as-is). County phone: (434) 542-5546. Well/septic typical.

Buckingham.technique: Accept terms -> Go to Map -> Quick Search by address -> click parcel -> Tax Cards icon opens PDF at /resources/landcards/000{ACCT#}.pdf.
Buckingham.quirks: Parcel# format: 188-2-6A. Acct# zero-padded 9 digits + 3-digit suffix (e.g. 000011611-001). Well/septic typical.

Prince Edward.quirks: CVR returns ~0 sales here — pull comps in Navica (andon 2026-06-26).

Mecklenburg.technique: ConciseCAMA search. May have NO building record for manufactured homes — get GLA from client or MLS history.
Mecklenburg.navica_both_accounts: MUST search BOTH Navica accounts — comps split by namespace: R57xxx = South Central (287); R70xxx-R71xxx = Southern Piedmont (397). Separate MLS# namespaces!
Mecklenburg.quirks: CVR returns ~0 sales. Full workflow + logins -> skills/property-search/references/navica-accounts.md.
